name: EVChan Translator
description: Translate web pages inline using an OpenAI-compatible LLM

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* https://*; frame-ancestors 'none'
